_comment: Mutation testing scoped to the core migration-logic modules named in mutation-analysis.md. The command runner re-runs the full off-engine harness suite (npm run test:js) per mutant; coverageAnalysis is off because the command runner has no per-test hooks. The ESM loader (tests/loader.mjs) anchors /emigration/ to its own location and stubs /core//base-standard, so Stryker's sandbox copy resolves to the mutated sandbox files - no inPlace needed.
